creator: p5B2EA84B3@t-online.de
text:
py38-pillow-8.2.0_1 is vulnerable:
  Pillow -- Regular Expression Denial of Service (ReDoS)
  CVE: CVE-2021-23437
  WWW: https://vuxml.FreeBSD.org/freebsd/ed8a4215-675c-11ec-8dd4-a0f3c100ae18.html

So please commit the patch upgrading to the version which fixes this severe vulnerability.

If anything prevents that, please communicate it here.
